briefdescription.para: This function disables video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function enabless video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function clears MSA values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function clears out Video Config Register values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video input polarity control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config1 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config2 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config3 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config4 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config5 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the vsample register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video msa1 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video msa2 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video msa3 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video HBlankInterval register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This is helper api that programs the VideoController MSA, VideoConfig registers for a specific stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This is helper api that clears the VideoController MSA, VideoConfig registers for a specific stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the bits per color value of the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
is the new number of bits per color to use.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the pixel mode of the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video format of the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
input mapping.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video stream to enable or disable.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
or Disable.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio stream interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
interface I2S or SPDIF .

briefdescription.para: This function sets the active audio data input.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
data input on different channels.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio data width val(16 bit - 24 bit).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
Data Width.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio input is operating in HBR mode or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
HBR mode en or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio num of channels used.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
num channels

briefdescription.para: This function controls the audio mute flag in VB-ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
mute clear or set

briefdescription.para: This function defines first byte of audio SDP and audio timestamp SDP header.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
Packet Id

briefdescription.para: This function defines audio timestamp version num.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
timestamp version number

briefdescription.para: This function defines audio clock frequency multiplier in relation to audio sample rate Fs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
clock frequency multiplier

briefdescription.para: This function programs the AUDIO_CONFIG1 registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio timestamp for sdp vertical ctrl.

detaileddescription.para: When set, dptx sends out audio timestamp SDP once every video frame during vertical blanking period.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
timestamp sdp enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio stream during vertical blanking .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
stream enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function sets SDP to be sent out during vertical intervals using data from SDP_REGISTER_BANK .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
SDP during vertical intervals.

briefdescription.para: This function sets 128 bytes of SDP by using SDP_REGISTER_BANK 1,2,3 and 4.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
128BytesSdp.

briefdescription.para: This function disables external SDP when set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
external SDP.

briefdescription.para: This function sets scheduler searches for next SDP to transmit based on fixed priority.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
fixed priority SDP scheduler.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the SDP_VERTICAL_CTRL registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio timestamp for sdp horizontal ctrl.

detaileddescription.para: When set, dptx sends out audio timestamp SDP once every video frame during horizontal blanking period.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
timestamp sdp enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio stream during horizontal blanking .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
stream enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function sets SDP to be sent out during horizontal intervals using data from SDP_REGISTER_BANK .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
SDP during horizontal intervals.

briefdescription.para: This function sets scheduler searches for next SDP to transmit based on fixed priority.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
fixed priority SDP scheduler.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the SDP_HORIZONTAL_CTRL registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function programs DpTx Audio Controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Sdp manual mode.

detaileddescription.para: Setting this bit causes corresponding SDP to be transmitted once.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
Sdp Manual Ctrl

briefdescription.para: This function overrides the number of available bytes required to transmit a 16 byte SDP during Horizontal blanking period.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function overrides the number of available bytes required to transmit a 16 byte SDP during Vertical blanking period.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the SDP_CONFIG_X registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function defines the header and data for SDP.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Scramble control for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the enhanced framing control for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the enhanced framing control with FEC feature for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets default fast link training for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function scales down debounce filter on HPD input for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function disables SPD nibble interleaving DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets aux reply timeout to either 400us or 3.2ms DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
for 400us, 0x1 for 3.2ms

briefdescription.para: This function enables MST mode for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function enables FEC feature for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets DpTx in eDP mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function use in MST mode only triggers link to start ACT sequence with DpRx of branch.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the core controller register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function enables mst mode in the core controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables mst act seq in the core controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for VC_PAYLOAD_TABLE_UPDATE status bit to be set.

detaileddescription.para: status. This ensures successful update of VC_PAYLOAD_TABLE.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for ACT_Handled status bit to be set.

detaileddescription.para: status. This ensures successful handling of ACT trigger.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates CCTL ACT sequence between DpTx and DpRx of the immediate branch device connected.

detaileddescription.para: Check DPCD Payload table update status. This ensures successful handling of ACT trigger sequence.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the virtual channel payload allocation table.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
Payload slot for each stream

briefdescription.para: Computes the MSA Misc0 field from the stream's BitsPerColor and the supplied color format, and stores the result in MsaConfig[Stream].Misc0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2).

briefdescription.para: Computes the HBlankInterval register value from the stream's HBlank, BitsPerColor, and the supplied color format, and stores the result in MsaConfig[Stream].HBlankInterval.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2/4:2:0).

briefdescription.para: Computes AvgBytesPerTu, AvgBytesPerTuFrac, InitThreshold, and InitThresholdHi for the VIDEO_CONFIG5 register using the stream's pixel clock, color depth, link config, and blanking parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2/4:2:0).

memberdef.argsstring: (XMmiDp *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, u8 Stream, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat)
memberdef.name: XMmiDp_SetVidControllerUseStdVidMode

briefdescription.para: Configures the video controller with standard video mode timing parameters including HActive, VActive, sync widths, blanking intervals, pixel clock, and dynamically computed MSA and transfer unit parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the standard video mode to configure.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2/4:2:0).
